ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Cento sonetti di Mutio Manfredi. Il Fermo Academicio Informe, &c.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: In Lode di Donne di Ravenna.
ItacWorkItem.Content: 100 sonnets each dedicated to a different woman.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The volume as a whole is dedicated to Livia Feltrio della Rovere.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
